institution: Yale University Library / Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library
manifest_rights_status: No item-specific rights or license value is supplied by the canonical IIIF manifest snapshot.

institutional_policy_assessment.public_domain_digital_representations: Yale states that its photographs and digitized copies of public-domain images are openly available for reuse.
institutional_policy_assessment.user_responsibility: Yale makes no warranty that a proposed use is non-infringing; users remain responsible for legal assessment and any necessary permissions.
institutional_policy_assessment.protected_materials: Permission from relevant rightsholders is required for protected material beyond fair use or other statutory exemptions.
institutional_policy_assessment.credit_line: Courtesy of the Yale University Library

project_policy.repository_content: The Git repository contains source metadata, URLs, dimensions, hashes, byte records, audits and protocols, but not the image binaries.
project_policy.external_store_access: The durable source store is private and access-controlled.
project_policy.publication_rule: Any public redistribution or publication must independently assess the intended use, preserve Yale provenance and use the institutional credit line where applicable.

evidence.title: Permission to Publish Materials Held in Library Collections
